headline: Fair Isaac (FICO) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price pressure, with the stock showing negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months and prompting investors to reassess its current valuation. See our latest analysis for Fair Isaac. At a share price of US$922.37, Fair Isaac has seen sharp short-term share price pressure, with a 30 day share price return of a 20.84% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 51.16% decline.
